titleStmt.title: SII 5.768: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 768. (A.R. No. 204 of 1895). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kocaṭilavaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉacakravatti kaḷ śrīparākkiṟamapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattoṉṟāvatiṉ Etir ṉālāvatu miṉañāyaṟṟu Irupatān tiyatiyum Aparapakṣa ttu pañcami yum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa A niṣattu nāḷ gauta ma gotra ttu bodhāyanasūtra ttu de vakulapperumāḷ maṅkaipperumāḷ gaṅgādharabha ṭṭaṉukku teṉvārināṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirukkuṟṟālamuṭaiyanayinār koyilil nampimāril Ekanāyakabha ṭṭan muraikku Ivaṉukku Āyāsam Āy pūcai muṭṭu varukaiyila
Āyāsa māṉa Ekaṉāyakabhaṭṭan svāmibhaṭṭa rum niṅkalāka Acaṟpaṅkāḷar nāluperum Ūrvaḻi poy pūcai muṭṭuvikka Itukoṇṭu pūcai muṭṭu vārāmal nam Arcca ṉai per viṭṭu pūcai naṭatta vaṭṭam ceytu Ūrvaḻi poy niṉ nālu paṅkāḷaraiyum Arttha hāni yum janmahā niyum Uruttaveṇumeṉṟu ṉām kopittirukkacceyte Ivarkaḷ Itu vārāmal Eṅkaḷ muṟai tirntu pūjitta gaṅgādharabhaṭṭa ṉukku paṅkukku 1 nāḷ Āka kuṭuppom Eṉṟu kaṟpittu mutaliyār
kulacekarapaṭṭaṉ nāḷ Añ Oṉṟum ciṟuttaṇṭaiyumkālum Aḻakiyāṉ nāḷ Añcil nāḷ Oṉṟum tirukkuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉ nāḷ Añcil nāḷ Oṉṟum civajñā ṉabhaṭṭan nāḷ Añcil nāḷ Oṉṟum Āka nāḷ nālum kuṭuppom Eṉṟu Ivarkaḷ collukaiyāle Ivarkaḷ poruntina mariyātiyile nāḷ nālum Ivaṉukku Eḻām paṅku kāṇiyāṭcaiyāka kuṭuppatuñ ceytu Ivakaḷ Uṭaimaiyi Iṟaiyiliyilum
kuṟaitta nāḷ viḻukkāṭṭil kuṭukka Eṉṟa Aḷavil Ivarkaḷukku paṟṟāka Itu koṇṭu Ivakaḷ Uṭaimaiyum Iṟaiyiliyum niṅkalāka kiḻaimarapilpaṟṟilum kaṉṉāneriyilum Āka muppattoṉṟāvatiṉ Etir muṉṟāvatu kār mutalukku Iraṇṭumā nilamum Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭu Acaṟpaṅkāḷaṟ kotta mariyāti śaivācāri yamum Arcca naiyum maṟṟum Ikkoyilkaḷil Uḷḷa svatantra ṅkaḷum peṟṟu pūcaiyum muṭṭuvārāmal
tu muppattoṉṟāvatuṉ Etir Iraṇṭāvatu Uṭaiyār tirukkuṟṟālamuṭaiyanayiṉār tiruvuḷḷampaṟṟik kuṭuttaruḷuṉ tirumukattiṉ paṭiyile kaiyāṇṭukoḷḷumpaṭiyum kaṟpitta Aḷuvukku Immariyātiyile Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu Eḻām paṅkukku kāṇiyāṭyākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭi Ācandratāram san=tatipraveśa me kaiyāṇṭupotavum pāṟka Ivai kiṭārattūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.768 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
